mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID EQUIP_UNIT_ID, t1.TYPE_NAME EQUIP_UNIT_NAME, t2.ID EQUIP_INSTITUTION_ID, t2.TYPE_NAME EQUIP_INSTITUTION_NAME, t3.ID EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, t3.TYPE_NAME EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME FROM E_M_EQPT_TYPE t1 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE t2 ON t1.PARENT_ID = t2.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_TYPE t3 ON t2.PARENT_ID = t3.ID WHERE t1.ID = #{equipUnitId}
